label: SpSS v2.6.0
info:
10.1.2026 Renamed:
Smart EV Charger Controller (OTE-CZ Dual Mode) -> Spot price Smart Switch (SpSS)

Fetches OTE-CZ prices, finds cheapest slot, sends Victron + Tesla scheduler.

name: Save desired SOC to flow
func:
flow.set('desired_soc', msg.payload);
return msg;

name: Save PrimaryWindow to flow
Config URL & Data Source Switch
Build ENTSO-E URL (D+1 → D)
ENTSO-E Retry + Backoff
CZ SP Controller Status v2.6.1
format:
CZ Spot Price Controller {{msg.payload.version}}

Status: OK FALLBACK

Source: {{msg.payload.source}}

Delivery day: {{msg.payload.delivery_day}}

Primary charging window

Start {{msg.payload.selected.primary.start}}:00
End {{msg.payload.selected.primary.end}}:00
Length {{msg.payload.selected.primary.hours}} h
Avg price {{msg.payload.selected.primary.avg}} EUR/MWh

Secondary charging window

Start {{msg.payload.selected.secondary.start}}:00
End {{msg.payload.selected.secondary.end}}:00
Length {{msg.payload.selected.secondary.hours}} h
Avg price {{msg.payload.selected.secondary.avg}} EUR/MWh
No suitable secondary charging window found

name: ECB FX parser v1.1
Build OTE URL (D+1 → D)
OTE Retry + Backoff
Save window_start_min
func:
flow.set('window_start_min', Number(msg.payload));
return msg;

name: Save window_start_max
func:
flow.set('window_start_max', Number(msg.payload));
return msg;

name: debug_controller
Clear ALL price caches!

Mode {{msg.payload.window_mode.replace('_',' ')}}

End {{msg.payload.selected_window.end}}:00
Duration {{msg.payload.selected_window.duration_h}} h
Avg price {{msg.payload.selected_window.avg_price_eur_mwh}} EUR/MWh
